Salv and faint are good for tanking and remain valuable for a long time, but your comp lacks damage. Would be a good idea to branch out more and level other units or pull for good limiteds

Can replace Aigis with Ogier if you want more immediate damage due to strength stacking, which is his speciality. But Aigis is nice for comfiness and vuln application

Oh okay, bet! I’ll pull for her then. This is really good to know! Thanks so much 🙏
Oh no lol
Is there any cons with running a mono-red team? There are no “weakness” mechanics like in other gacha, are there?

There are Pure Realm mechanics, and Mixed Realm mechanics. If you have 3 caro units, and an Aequor unit, it will be "mixed". Both the functions of the Caro realm unique mechanic, and Aequor realm unique mechanic, will be weaker. But counter to what i've said, it's usually stronger to combine realms. Usually mixing them is worth the trade-off in effectiveness. Chaos doesn't have this issue. If you have 3 caro units, and 1 chaos unit, it will count as Pure. You will get the full effectiveness of the Caro realm as a result. That is Chaos's unique realm mechanic, the other that they have when playing "Pure Chaos" is that their Posse will activate twice after some time. Caro has the gauge, and healing furnace.
It's a bit complex to understand at first
Caro/Ultra mix is one of the strongest team compositions in the game, for example

Chaos units are included in most teams, as a lot of the best support units, or even DPS, are chaos faction. 24, Tawil, Ryker, Hamelyn, Lily, Ramona, Ogier, etc. They also give a boost to your death resistance when at least one is in the team.
Ohhhhh, wow. I was wondering what their “shtick” was. That makes a lot of sense!!
